data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimized choices enhance decision-making speed for users navigating the site.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Optimized button size and positioning for ease of use across devices.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design elements follow familiar patterns to align with user expectations.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together to improve visual hierarchy.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Design reduces visual complexity, presenting information in a direct manner.
